MSD Partners, L.P. (Profit share) (private investment company) (value not readily ascertainable)

MSD Partners, L.P. places 2.5% of the firm's net profits into a "Partners Profit Pool". Net profits were calculated based on excess management fees plus realized profits on underlying investments. The filer is entitled to a percentage of the "Partners Profit Pool".  Value not ascertainable because timing and amount of profit is unknown.

LCR Capital Partners LLC units (EB-5 business and investment firm)
I will continue to participate in this defined contribution plan. The plan sponsor will not make further contributions after my separation. (2014-10-01)
I was awarded vested call warrants in the business in exchange for my unpaid time.  I will retain my vested warrants. (2021-03-01)
I will continue to participate in the McKinsey & Company defined contribution retirement plans. The plan sponsor ceased making contributions at my separation. (2003-01-01)

Pursuant to my contract, I retain profit share in MSD Partners, L.P. as compensation for services provided in 2014 to current day. Payment is determined by profitability of MSD Partners, L.P. (2014-10-01)
Pursuant to my contract, I will retain health insurance coverage until the age of 65. (2014-10-01)
Consistent with all other eligible employees, including former employees, I receive a fee discount for MSD Partners, L.P. funds that I invest in while an employee. (2014-10-01)

Pursuant to my contract, I retain carried interest in MSD Special Investments Fund II, MSD Real Estate Credit Opportunity Fund II, MSD Investment Corp, MSD Growth Fund, L.P., BDT Capital Partners Fund 4, L.P., and Kingfish Investments X, LLC as compensation for services provided while making the underlying fund investments. Payment is determined by the performance of the underlying investments, all of which are provided in part 2. (2014-10-01)
BDT Capital Partners, LLC, Group Personal Excess Program

My formal separation agreement was completed subsequent to the filing of my financial disclosure report. At the time the formal agreement was completed, terms were finalized, and the group excess policy was terminated.
I will continue coverage under this plan through March 15, 2026. The policy is not convertible to a personal excess liability policy. (2014-10-01)

Pursuant to my employment agreement, I will receive a contractual bonus for services rendered in 2025 up to the date of my departure from the firm. This bonus will be paid prior to my assuming the duties of the position of Assistant Secretary. (2014-10-01)
Participate in the management of the company.
